response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack and systems software developer with strong TypeScript, Node.js, and some low-latency/performance engineering experience, but the resume shows no relevant background in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator architecture, GPU workload analysis, SIMD/MIMD systems, or hardware-software co-design at the chip level. The Principal Performance Architect role demands deep hardware architecture expertise that is entirely absent from his profile.
strengths: Meets the BS+8yr experience threshold with over 14 years of professional software development
Demonstrated performance engineering awareness through low-latency, high-throughput work at Sociomantic using async I/O and high-performance databases
Exposure to C/C++ and systems-level tooling at National Instruments, indicating some proximity to lower-level engineering
concerns: No SoC or IP modeling experience of any kind — the core technical requirement of the role
No AI/deep-learning workload expertise, GPU architecture knowledge, or SIMD/MIMD background
Profile is fundamentally web and application software; no hardware-software co-design or chip-level architecture work present

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU architecture experience
